variants: Cristal Gutierrez, a resident of the Copperbee Range, was born in Forestgate Fields. She is renowned for her invention, the Blossom Forge Engine, which marks a significant advancement in metallurgy. As a member of the Emberwing Metallurgists Guild, Cristal collaborates with like-minded individuals who share her passion for the craft. Her contributions to the field were recognized with the prestigious Greythorn Crest, an honor she proudly cherishes. Cristal’s innovative mindset continues to inspire her peers and aspiring metallurgists alike.

Born in the scenic area of Forestgate Fields, Cristal Gutierrez currently resides in the Copperbee Range. A significant part of her career includes the authorship of the Blossom Forge Engine, an invention that has earned her respect in the metallurgical community. Her dedication networks her with the Emberwing Metallurgists Guild, where she shares her enthusiasm for her field. In recognition of her notable contributions, Cristal has been awarded the Greythorn Crest, a testament to her hard work and achievements.
